creator: george@m5p.com
text:
I've just booted this patched kernel ten times in a row and got no crash.  Now this is pure nonsense on my part, but the (ahem) reliable way for me to cause the crash has been to enter single-user mode, run my script (that loads the modules in question), and then exit to multi-user mode as quickly as possible.  It doesn't always happen, but I am wondering if anything in the patch could possibly be fixing the crash?

I am sure I am running the patched kernel.  The /boot/kernel/kernel file is 200 bytes longer than the unpatched kernel, which is the same length as yesterday's kernel.
